Home› Plushies› Drago the Dragon

Drago the Dragon

Approx. size: 21 cm

A handmade crochet dragon with little wings — brave, colourful and ready for adventures. Each one is completely one of a kind.

Shop on Etsy

Each friend is one of a kind — when it's gone, it's gone. Tap through to see it on Etsy.

about this little friend

Meet your new little guardian. Drago is lovingly handmade using soft, high-quality yarn, carefully crafted to bring joy, comfort and a touch of magic.

With tiny horns, sparkly wings and sweet textured details, this cuddly dragon makes the perfect companion for cosy days, imaginative play or a thoughtful handmade gift. Not just a toy — a tiny friend for life.

The details

  • Height: approx. 21 cm
  • Green body, white horns, blue wings & spikes, red tongue
  • Unique design with textured details
  • Made to order — please allow 3–7 business days before shipping

Materials

  • Premium yarn
  • Safety eyes
  • Fibrefill stuffing

Perfect for

  • Kids, dragon lovers and fantasy fans
  • Nursery decor
  • Baby showers, birthdays & holidays

Care

  • Spot clean gently and air dry

Contains safety eyes — not recommended for children under 3 without supervision.
